Section 138 NI Act: Dishonour of cheque for insufficiency, etc., of funds in the account. Where any cheque drawn by a person on an account maintained by him with a banker for payment of any amount of money to another person from out of that account for the discharge, in whole or in part, of any debt or other liability, is returned by the bank unpaid...

Section 420 IPC: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property. Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property to any person, or to make, alter or destroy the whole or any part of a valuable security... shall be punished with imprisonment.

Rent Control Act: Eviction of tenant on the ground of bona fide requirement. A landlord can seek eviction of a tenant if the premises are reasonably and bona fide required by the landlord for his own occupation.
